title: post api auth sign up email register new user
description: Test the user registration endpoint POST /api/auth/sign-up/email with valid email, password, and name to ensure it returns 200 with the created User object.

title: get api saas plans list all saas plans
description: Test the GET /api/saas/plans endpoint to verify it returns 200 with a list of all available SaaS subscription plans.

title: post api saas subscribe create subscription
description: Test the POST /api/saas/subscribe endpoint with valid Authorization and planId to ensure it creates a subscription and returns 200 with SubscriptionResponse.

title: get api academies academyid students list students for academy
description: Test the GET /api/academies/:academyId/students endpoint with valid Authorization to verify it returns 200 with a list of students scoped to the specified academy.

title: post api academies academyid students create student for academy
description: Test the POST /api/academies/:academyId/students endpoint with valid Authorization and valid student data (name and email) to ensure it creates a student and returns 200 with the Student object.

title: get api academies academyid instructors list instructors for academy
description: Test the GET /api/academies/:academyId/instructors endpoint with valid Authorization to verify it returns 200 with a list of instructors scoped to the specified academy.
